definitions: 肠；肠道（尤指大小肠，与 bowel movement 搭配时常指排便相关）

examples.text: Well, each day we lose two to three liters through our sweat, urine, and bowel movements, and even just from breathing. While these functions are essential to our survival,
examples.explanation: 这里的 bowel 出现在 bowel movements 中，意思是“排便、肠道排泄”。整句在说：我们每天会通过出汗、排尿、排便，甚至呼吸流失两到三升水分。学习时可顺带记搭配 bowel movement = 排便。

source.text: What would happen if you didn’t drink water? - Mia Nacamulli
